negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for tom_turkey_neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for tom_turkey_neg.tptp
3. ~type(tom,eastern) [input(axiom)]
8. ~type(tom,eastern) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~~type(tom,eastern) [negated conjecture 8]
10. type(tom,eastern) [flattening 9]
27. ~type(tom,eastern) [cnf transformation 3]
32. type(tom,eastern) [cnf transformation 10]
33. $false [forward subsumption resolution 27,32]
% SZS output end Proof for tom_turkey_neg.tptp
